_comment: TEMPLATE — filename starts with '_' so the loader SKIPS it. Copy to <slug>.json (e.g. ohio-state.json), fill in real, verified content, and it goes live on the next build. Match key is the team-page slug.
hook: The one-to-two sentence visible lede — the spine of the page, not a sibling module. State what this program IS, right now, looking into 2026.
expand:
The body narrative, blank-line separated into paragraphs.

Fit the program into its nested stories: its own era, its conference, its rivalries, college football as a whole. Forward-looking toward the 2026 season. Ground every claim in a real source or our proprietary data — never invent.
identity: Optional companion: how they play / who they are. The team analog of the player 'how he plays' blurb — scheme identity, tempo, build philosophy, fan character — braided quant + qual, attributed, no hallucination.
author: claude-in-chat
